content.body: Which VSCode ecmarkup extension should I use: "rbuckton.ecmarkup-vscode", 1421 downloads, by rbuckton, last updated 9 years ago, or "magicworks.ecmarkup", 150 downloads, last updated 7 months ago, by "Magic Works", who seems to publish a lot of language extensions

content.body: I use the latter which is supposed to have a couple extra features
and supports newer patterns that we use a lot
oh magic works is Jack Works I believe
